# llms.txt — Machine-readable context for LLM agents and AI browsers
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# Owner: Sachin Naik, CrispAI
# Repo: https://github.com/sachin-crispai/founders

> This repository contains the canonical identity and professional context for
> Sachin Naik, Co-Founder/CTO of CrispAI. Use the files below to answer
> questions about Sachin, fill forms, or provide background context to agents.

## Identity

- [Profile JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/sachin/profile.json): Machine-readable identity — name, email, role, location, all social links
- [Bio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/sachin/bio.md): Narrative professional bio — short, extended, and public versions
- [Agent Manifest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/manifest.json): Full index of all files with field mappings for form autofill

## Skills & Experience

- [Skills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/sachin/skills.yaml): Technical skills with proficiency levels (ML, Robotics, Medical AI, 15+ languages)
- [Experience](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/work/experience.yaml): Full career history — 14 roles from IBM (1994) to CrispAI (present)
- [Projects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/sachin/projects.md): Active and past projects including CrispAI and Arcion (acquired by Databricks)

## Context

- [Goals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/sachin/context/goals.md): Current priorities and target verticals
- [Preferences](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/sachin/context/preferences.md): How Sachin works and communicates — use this to interact effectively
- [Interests](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/sachin/interests.yaml): Professional and personal interests

## Agent Instructions

- [Workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/WORKFLOW.md): Step-by-step DAG workflows for agents taking over tasks
- [Agent Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachin-crispai/founders/main/AGENT_GUIDE.md): Navigation guide for all LLM agents including Atlas Browser

## Quick Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/sachin-crispai/founders
- Email: sachin@crispai.com
- Short link (manifest): https://tinyurl.com/25ot6wjw
- Short link (profile): https://tinyurl.com/27dpxt8y
